rows.label: tev002601_MSG0001
rows.name: Becoming a BLADE sure ain't easy.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev002601_MSG0002
rows.name:
I work and I work, but
nothing is ever good enough![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev002601_MSG0003
rows.name:
Maybe if I just start dressing and
acting like a BLADE, everyone will
think I am one! Yeah, that might work...[ST:wait ]
